name: Manufacturing PMI
description: The Purchasing Managers' Index surveys factory managers on new orders, output, employment and prices. A reading above 50 signals expansion; below 50 signals contraction. It's a private, forward-looking survey, not an official statistic.
source: S&P Global / HSBC India Manufacturing PMI
releaseSchedule: Released monthly, on the first working day of the following month.

chart.title: Factories have stayed firmly in expansion
chart.subtitle: Manufacturing PMI, monthly (50 = no change)
